title: Map out how everything in my world connects — from lore to a queryable web
fixture: REQUIRED: a book with ACTIVE (recorded) world info and ZERO chapter prose — SKILL_BOOK_ID
fixture_note: The crux of S04 is: can connections be built from STRUCTURED LORE when no chapter prose exists? A fixture with prose masks the crux (the agent just extracts from chapters). As of 2026-07-10 no such book exists in the dev DB: every book with active entities has prose, and the prose-less candidates (019e0000-…-cccc-*) are synthetic seeds with no book row and NULL entity names. Build the fixture before running — the concrete recipe is in the scenario doc's §7 (docs/specs/2026-07-09-agent-discoverability-and-workflow/scenarios/S04-kg-build-from-glossary.md).

turns.user: Use the world info I've entered to map out how everything connects.
Who is Lâm Uyên connected to?
